scripts.migrate:prod: npx prisma migrate deploy --schema waterting/prisma/schema.prisma || npx prisma db push --schema waterting/prisma/schema.prisma --accept-data-loss
scripts.build:api: npm install && cd waterting/apps/api && npx nest build
scripts.start:api: npm run migrate:prod && cd waterting/apps/api && (node dist/main || (echo 'DEBUG: Listing files...' && ls -R dist && node dist/main))
